package in.co.rays.proj4.model
  • Classes

    Description

    CollegeModel
    CollegeModel is a Model class that handles database operations for the College entity.
    CourseModel
    CourseModel is a Model class that handles database operations for the Course entity.
    FacultyModel
    FacultyModel is a Model class that handles database operations related to the Timetable entity for faculty-related queries.
